text:
- Update to 0.076

Changelog:
http://en.znc.in/wiki/ChangeLog/0.076

As 0.076 brings the "extra" modules into the main ZNC package, this update 
removes the need for the irc/znc-extra port.

Port maintainer (miwi@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99
